❌ BEFORE — Global \`input:focus-visible { outline: none }\`

Tabbing through: the button shows a focus ring, but the input does not. Inconsistent and inaccessible keyboard navigation.



Input: no visible focus. Button: visible focus ring. → Inconsistent.

✅ AFTER — Focus outline override removed

Tabbing through: both the input and the button show a visible focus indicator. Consistent and accessible keyboard navigation.



Input: browser default focus ring. Button: component focus ring. → Consistent.
